title: He's not my son anymore
description: A horror mod with a creepy story and a monster that was once just a kid.
body:
Mother and son shared a cozy house, where there was an atmosphere of love and understanding. Their lives flowed smoothly, until one day fate threw them into a mysterious forest full of mysteries and mysteries. It was there, among the trees and the whispering wind, that she encountered an angel, a being who was supposed to represent light and hope. But instead, meeting him had awakened something else in her: anger, fear, and a sense of threat.

In this state of confusion and panic, she began to defend herself from an invisible enemy that seemed to be chasing her at every turn. Reality began to blur around her, and she lost touch with what was dear to her. At that moment, when the adrenaline was pumping, a terrible tragedy occurred: in a fit of fear and despair, she accidentally shot her son.

This moment was a turning point in her life. Her son's death had left a deep wound in her heart, and his spirit remained by her side like a shadow, haunting her. He haunted her in her nightmares and in every reflection, forcing her to relive that terrible scene over and over again. The mother was trapped in her own guilt and fear, which led her to consider suicide — the only way out of this endless hell.

However, even after she passed away, his soul did not find peace. She remained attached to this world, wandering between realities, unable to free herself from the pain of loss. Their story became a sad reminder of how quickly life can change and how difficult it is sometimes to find a way to forgive yourself and those who were loved.

This mod adds a monster named "son". The monster is a spirit that wanders in the dark and can come out when necessary. You must survive in this hell that this monster creates. This mod is a horror game with unexpected monster attacks.
